'''Galemus Hejaran''' was a member of the influential [[Hejaran family]] of [[House Mecetti]]. He was the uncle of Baron [[Lucian Hejaran]], [[Themion Hejaran]] and [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Brigta Hejaran]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Blood Inheritance|book=Tapani Sector Instant Adventures}} {{1st}}
